claimText: Stanford's BCA issued guidance on generative AI use, and the Office of Community Standards recommends that instructors give advance notice to students when using AI detection software.

citation.citationTitle: Generative AI Policy Guidance - Office of Community Standards (BCA)
citation.publisher: Stanford University Office of Community Standards
